$comment: The Nest app runs as a single serverless function (api/index.ts). Every path is rewritten to it, and the app's own '/api' global prefix is preserved because the original request URL passes through. CORS is handled exclusively by the Nest app (enableCors in app.setup.ts, driven by FRONTEND_URL) — do NOT add static CORS headers here; they would silently override the env-driven config. maxDuration is raised for the AI analysis calls (Hobby caps at 60s; Pro allows more).
